inputs.text: Mujhe bukhar hai aur thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai, sar dard bhi hai

inputs.text: Mujhe khansi ho rahi hai, dry cough hai, par bukhar utna nahin hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis

inputs.text: Mujhe khansi 2 hafte se zyada ho gayi hai, raat ko pasina aata hai, wazan bhi kam ho raha hai
inputs.image_desc: pale appearance, dark circles under eyes

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Cardinal signs of night sweats, weight loss, and prolonged cough

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely due to presence of systemic symptoms

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely due to absence of acute respiratory distress

inputs.text: Mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, khansi mein kabhi-kabhi khoon bhi aata hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Presence of hemoptysis and severe weakness

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to presence of systemic and respiratory symptoms

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to chronicity of symptoms and absence of acute respiratory distress
